name: Quintana Roo (Mexico)

colors.symbolism: the field and details of the arms
the Caribbean Sea and details of the arms
the sun and details of the arms
the tropical jungles and details of the arms

description: A white field with the coat of arms of the state of Quintana Roo centred.
history: Quintana Roo has no officially adopted state flag; the design shown — a white field bearing the state coat of arms — is in de facto use to represent the state.

features.symbolism: A white field charged with the state coat of arms, in the typical pattern of Mexican state flags.

features.role: coat of arms of Quintana Roo
features.symbolism: The arms reference the rising sun over the Caribbean, the conch and the three stars symbolising the state's principal regions, the tropical landscape, and the Maya cultural heritage of the territory.
